ProtectedPages.attendanceApprovalMethodAllMustApproveDe: All approvers must approve the request before it can move to the next step. If one person rejects, the request stops at this step.
ProtectedPages.attendanceApprovalMethodFirstApprovesDes: The first approver decides whether to approve or reject the request so it either moves to the next step or is rejected. Other approvers afterward cannot act on the request once it has been approved or rejected.
